scope.note: Structural parity only (folder/file path presence). Semantic port correctness is not verified by this script.

doctrineDriverNamespaceExceptions.reason: Doctrine cache subsystem depends on PHP-specific PSR interfaces (for example PSR logging/cache) and is intentionally excluded from Node parity requirements.
PHP-specific Doctrine driver; Node port uses mysql2 adapter instead.
PHP PDO-specific Doctrine drivers are intentionally not ported in Node.
PHP-specific Doctrine driver; no Node OCI adapter in this port.
PHP-specific Doctrine driver; no Node ibmdb2 adapter in this port.
PHP-specific Doctrine driver API converter namespace (OCI).
PHP-specific Doctrine driver API converter namespace (ibmdb2).
Node-specific adapter uses driver/pg instead of Doctrine driver/pgsql.
Node-specific adapter uses driver/mssql instead of Doctrine driver/sql-server.

exceptions.note: These Doctrine paths are excluded from missing counts due to Node-specific driver architecture or intentional PHP-only omissions.

conventions.note: Code rename checks are token-based and may include comments/strings for manual review.
